case_title: ELI SAKOV ET AL VS. MARILYN ANDREWS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 18, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS ELI SAKOV AND ADAM SAKOV ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARILYN ANDREWS DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,333.10 FILED BY SAKOV, ELI SAKOV, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, MARILYN DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-18-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELI SAKOV IS PRESENT. PLIANTIFF ADAM SAKOV IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARILYN ANDREWS DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR HIS CO-PLAINTIFF TO BE PRESENT IN COURT. PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED THAT THEY MAY TIMELY FILE A REQEUST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-22-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *NOT SIGNED* COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, MARILYN DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDREWS, MARILYN DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAKOV, ELI SAKOV, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREWS, MARILYN DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS $2,758.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,848.00, BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT SHALL BE RETURNED TO THE PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAKOV, ELI AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, MARILYN DBA BOARDWALK INVESTMENTS
